name: Plantation Plum Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix flour with the raisins, currants, citron, bread crumbs, and almonds.
2. In a separate bowl, beat eggs and brown sugar until well combined.
3. Add suet to the egg mixture and stir until incorporated.
4. Gradually add the sherry or brandy to the egg-suet mixture.
5. Stir in the ground cloves, nutmeg, cinnamon, and soda.
6. Mix all ingredients together until just combined.
7. Divide the batter evenly among four 1 lb containers.
8. Cover each container tightly with waxed paper and secure with string.
9. Steam the puddings on a rack set in a large pot filled with water that is just below the rack level for 3 hours.
10. Remove from steam and allow to cool slightly before serving.
11. Garnish as desired and serve with hard sauce or sherry sauce.
